body:
## Working session summary

Implemented and pushed the fix to PR 11: https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/pull/11

What changed:
- Removed the unused demo `Preview` control.
- Added prefilled GitHub issue links for unknown responses and normal assistant dialogs, including transcript and environment metadata.
- Added the `identity` intent for “Who are you?” style prompts across Rust, WASM, JS fallback, tests, and seed data.
- Added the Issue 10 case study data and a committed UI screenshot in the PR body.

Verification:
- Local checks passed: `cargo fmt --check`, `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features`, `rust-script scripts/check-file-size.rs`, `cargo test`, `node --check`, and `npm run test:local`.
- CI/CD Pipeline run `25758140433` passed for head SHA `69392564082c79c471efdb7761885e62638b19eb`.
- PR is marked ready for review and merge state is clean.
- Local preview server is running at http://localhost:3457

References used: GitHub issue URL query docs, MDN `URLSearchParams`, and W3C `role="status"` guidance.
